summary: Read-only reviewer 04 provenance/source/claim lineage review. Inspected memory registry, AGENTS protocol, completion and unfinished-plan docs, source-lineage implementation, verifier fixtures, and current source_lineage_status. No source files modified.
decisions: User intent is a closed-loop local-first memory OS where sessions become reviewed, source-aware, retrievable knowledge while current user instruction remains supreme.

Current source-lineage plan is directionally correct but incomplete because actual source-truth detection still treats 40_Projects as project_memory and accepted factual instances as internal_claim unless explicitly behavior memory or 20_Wiki-focused.
Reviewer 04 verdict is DISAGREE until P0-C expands factual/public/external/high-risk claim detection beyond 20_Wiki and adds regression fixtures for project and accepted-instance unsupported claims.
next_steps: Revise P0-C to require source-truth classification across 20_Wiki, 40_Projects, 50_Instances/accepted, and any curated factual claim record.
Add verifier fixtures proving unsupported factual project and accepted instance claims fail, verified claim chunks pass, and anchor-only URLs do not count as support.
Wire source-lineage blockers into verify:goal, health, Observatory readiness, and Context Pack item labels before counting reviewer agreement.
